ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $300.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE:MAY-01-2014 UNTIL: APRIL-01-2015. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $370.00.IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
